---
pagetitle: Upcoming Events | FishMIP
description-meta: |
    To assist with simulation rounds we meet regularly with modelers to troubleshoot any issues and implementation.
---

::: {.column-screen style="margin-top: -2.9em;"}
![](../images/shutterstock_169126697%20(4).jpeg){.banner fig-align="center"}
:::

::: {.column-screen .mx-3 .mx-lg-4 .mx-xl-5 .px-3 .px-lg-4 .px-xl-5}
# Upcoming Events

## Ad-hoc online modeller meetings

To assist with simulation rounds we meet regularly with modelers to troubleshoot any issues and implementation. Please contact regional and global model coordinators to find our more.

## Past events

View a list of our past events [here](pastevents.qmd).
:::
